Table of Contents

Enum esriTimeLocaleFormat

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Esri time string formats.

[Guid("B455848E-735D-479E-9434-9F3768D8D5B5")]
public enum esriTimeLocaleFormat

Fields

esriTLFDefaultDateTime = 0

0: Uses the system locale default date format and time format.

esriTLFLongDate = 1

1: Uses the system locale long date format only.

esriTLFLongTime = 3

3: Uses 12 hour time format.

esriTLFShortDate = 2

2: Uses the system locale short date format only.

esriTLFShortTime = 4

4: Uses 24 hour time format.
